title: Uttam Jan So
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Uttam Jan So" where he says, just as the saline sea leaves its saltiness & becomes sweet on meeting the clouds, one should always keep the company of good. S01 E25.

title: Ek Saadhey Sab
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Rahim's doha "Ek Saadhey Sab" where he says, we must focus on one task at a time, if one tries to work on multiple tasks at the same time, none of the tasks will be. S01 E04.

title: Kariye Sukh
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Kariye Sukh" where he says, people can't be truly happy if they make others sad. One must take care to ensure that his happiness does not cause sadness to. S01 E11.

title: Maarag Chalte Jau
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Kabir's doha "Maarag Chalte Jau" where he says, a person walking on a path is on a journey & if he falls do not criticize him, as he is at least trying to reach. S01 E23.

title: Bigdi Baat Banai
desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Rahim's doha "Bigdi Baat Banai" where he says, if things go wrong, there is no use of sitting hanging on it, but a new industry should be started anew. S01 E10.
